name: create_documents
description: Create one or more draft documents by directly providing structured content. Creates drafts (drafts.* prefix) unless releaseId is specified for version creation.

intent.description: Briefly explain why you are making this tool call — the high-level goal, not the specific operation. For example: "migrating content from legacy CMS", "building a product catalog for launch", "cleaning up orphaned references after schema change". Make sure to not include any secrets, API keys, or information that can be considered sensitive. This helps us understand usage patterns and improve the tools.

dataset.description: The name of the dataset in the project

resource.description: Resource information indicating which project ID and dataset to target

content.description: JSON content to directly populate the document with. Prefer Sanity-generated _id values by omitting _id unless a stable custom document ID is required.

documents.description: Array of documents to create. Each document must have a type and content. Prefer Sanity-generated _id values by omitting _id from content unless a stable custom document ID is required.

workspaceName.description: Workspace name as returned by `list_workspace_schemas`. Not a document type. Defaults to "default".

releaseId.description: Optional release ID for creating versioned documents. If provided, documents will be created under the specified release version instead of as drafts.
